name: rl-developer-memory
description: Local-first RL/control developer workflow bundle for Codex with MCP-backed memory, validation, and operational tooling.

interface.shortDescription: RL-aware Codex bundle with theorem-to-code workflow guidance, validation discipline, and MCP-backed memory controls.
interface.longDescription: rl-developer-memory combines local SQLite-backed RL/control memory retrieval with broader Codex workflow guidance for theorem-to-code alignment, validation-first delivery, rollout posture, preference/guardrail workflows, and reliable daily experimentation.
